_comment: Byte budgets per smoke-test variant, ~10% above sizes measured 2026-07-09 (rustc 1.94.1: matmul 59207, lu 123751, full 921812, full-relaxed 905452). History: full was ~447k pre-faer-schur; +26 KB real Schur+reordering, +260 KB c64 Schur/eigensolver stack (2026-07-08), +183 KB c64 LU/QR/LLT/SVD/hermitian-EVD stacks for the dense foundation probes (2026-07-09). The c64 monomorphizations now dominate; a consumer skipping complex stays near ~500 KB. A budget failure means dependency or codegen creep - investigate before raising. Sizes are pre-wasm-opt, pre-gzip.
